prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Garrett GT3582R turbocharger** (hybrid billet wheel) paired with a **McLaren M838TL (3.8L V8 twin-turbo) engine** ported and polished cylinder heads by **Dyno Dynamics UK**, increasing boost pressure to 1.6 bar (23.2 psi) with a custom **Motec M150 ECU** map for 800+ WHP on **VP Racing Q16 fuel** (116 octane).

Installation of **Novitec McLaren 675LT-specific forged internals**, including **Carrillo H-beam connecting rods**, **JE Pistons 2618 forged pistons (9.0:1 compression)**, and a **billet crankshaft** with **ACL Race Series bearings**, supporting 9,500 RPM redline and 1,200 Nm of torque.

Full **Akrapovič Titanium Evolution exhaust system** with **3.5-inch diameter downpipes**, **scavenged X-pipe**, and **valved bypass for track/cruise modes**, reducing backpressure by 42% and adding a **12 dB aggressive crackle tune** via **McLaren Special Operations (MSO) software integration**.
estetica: **Liberty Walk LB-WORKS McLaren 675LT widebody kit** (carbon fiber, 50mm extended fenders) with **custom front splitter canards** and **duckbill rear spoiler extension** for +30% downforce at 180 mph.

**Vorsteiner V-FF 107 forged carbon fiber wheels** (20x10.5 front, 21x12.5 rear) wrapped in **Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires (255/30 R20, 325/25 R21)**, paired with **AP Racing CP9660 monoblock calipers** and **390mm carbon-ceramic rotors** for 1,500 kg stopping power.

**McLaren MSO Heritage Racing Stripes** (gloss black over **MSO Bespoke Volcano Yellow paint**) with **3M Scotchlite reflective pinstriping**, **carbon fiber side skirts with integrated LED turn signals**, and a **custom rear diffuser by 1016 Industries** featuring **active Gurney flaps** for dynamic aero adjustment.
